cards.front: Where is the nearest MRT station?
cards.pinyin: zuìjìn de jiéyùn zhàn zài nǎlǐ?

cards.front: Please tap your EasyCard here.
Does this train go to Taipei Main Station?
cards.back: 這班車有到台北車站嗎？
cards.pinyin: zhè bān chē yǒu dào Táiběi chēzhàn ma?

cards.front: I need to transfer at Zhongxiao Fuxing.
cards.pinyin: wǒ yào zài Zhōngxiào Fùxīng zhuǎnchē.

cards.front: The MRT stops running at midnight.
Could you please move toward the back?
cards.back: 可以麻煩往後面移動嗎？
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ máfan wǎng hòumiàn yídòng ma?

cards.front: I'd like to top up my EasyCard.
Excuse me, is this seat taken?
cards.back: 請問這個位子有人坐嗎？
cards.pinyin: qǐngwèn zhège wèizi yǒurén zuò ma?

cards.front: Please give up priority seats to those in need.
cards.back: 請把博愛座讓給需要的人。
cards.pinyin: qǐng bǎ bó'àizuò ràng gěi xūyào de rén.

cards.front: I'll take a YouBike to the park.
cards.back: 我要騎 YouBike 去公園。
cards.pinyin: wǒ yào qí YouBike qù gōngyuán.

cards.front: The scooter parking is over there.
Watch out for scooters when you cross the street.
Can I pay my bills at the convenience store?
Could you heat this up for me, please?
cards.pinyin: zhège kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiārè ma?

cards.front: Do you have tea eggs?
Can I get a receipt?
I'm here to pick up my package.
Two oden skewers, please.
Is there an ATM in this store?
cards.pinyin: zhè jiān diàn lǐ yǒu tíkuǎnjī ma?

cards.front: Could I have a plastic bag?
cards.back: 可以給我一個塑膠袋嗎？
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ gěi wǒ yīge sùjiāodài ma?

cards.front: Where is the microwave?
I'd like a large hot Americano.
cards.pinyin: wǒ yào yī bēi dà bēi rè měishì.

cards.front: One beef noodle soup, please.
Is this dish spicy?
cards.pinyin: zhè dào cài huì là ma?

cards.front: I'm a vegetarian.
Could I have less oil and less salt?
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ shǎo yóu shǎo yán ma?

cards.front: For here or to go?
Can I have extra chili sauce?
cards.back: 可以多給我一點辣椒醬嗎？
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ duō gěi wǒ yīdiǎn làjiāojiàng ma?

cards.front: The bill, please.
Do you take EasyCard here?
I'd like to try the stinky tofu.
One bubble tea, half sugar, less ice.
cards.back: 一杯珍珠奶茶，半糖少冰。
cards.pinyin: yī bēi zhēnzhū nǎichá, bàn táng shǎo bīng.

cards.front: Add extra pearls, please.
This is delicious!
Can we get a table for two?
cards.pinyin: wǒmen liǎng ge rén, yǒu wèizi ma?

cards.front: Do you have an English menu?
I'm allergic to peanuts.
Please don't add cilantro.
What do you recommend?
Can I have steamed dumplings instead of fried?
cards.back: 我要蒸餃，不要煎餃，可以嗎？
cards.pinyin: wǒ yào zhēngjiǎo, bùyào jiānjiǎo, kěyǐ ma?

cards.front: How much is the fried chicken cutlet?
The night market is so crowded tonight.
Let's try the pepper buns.
Can I take a photo of this?
Is this freshly made?
One mango shaved ice to share.
cards.pinyin: yī fèn mángguǒ bīng yīqǐ chī.

cards.front: These games look fun, let's play.
cards.back: 這些遊戲看起來很好玩，我們來玩。
cards.pinyin: zhèxiē yóuxì kàn qǐlái hěn hǎowán, wǒmen lái wán.

cards.front: The grilled squid smells amazing.
It's raining again, did you bring an umbrella?
cards.pinyin: yòu xiàyǔ le, nǐ yǒu dài sǎn ma?

cards.front: It's so humid today.
There's a typhoon coming this weekend.
cards.pinyin: zhège zhōumò yǒu táifēng yào lái.

cards.front: Will there be a typhoon day off?
The air quality is bad today.
Summer here is hot and sticky.
cards.pinyin: zhèlǐ de xiàtiān yòu rè yòu nián.

cards.front: Don't forget your raincoat.
The forecast says it'll clear up tomorrow.
I'm looking for an apartment near the MRT.
cards.back: 我在找捷運附近的房子。
cards.pinyin: wǒ zài zhǎo jiéyùn fùjìn de fángzi.

cards.front: How much is the monthly rent?
Are utilities included?
The trash truck comes at seven.
Which bag is for recycling?
cards.pinyin: nǎ yī dài shì huíshōu de?

cards.front: The Wi-Fi isn't working again.
Can you fix the air conditioner?
cards.pinyin: lěngqì kěyǐ bāng wǒ xiū ma?

cards.front: I need to do laundry today.
The landlord wants to raise the rent.
Please take off your shoes before coming in.
I'm running late for work.
Let's grab coffee after the meeting.
cards.pinyin: kāi wán huì wǒmen qù hē kāfēi.

cards.front: What time do you get off work?
Can we reschedule to next week?
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ gǎi dào xià lǐbài ma?

cards.front: Nice to meet you, here's my business card.
cards.back: 很高興認識你，這是我的名片。
cards.pinyin: hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ, zhè shì wǒ de míngpiàn.

cards.front: Let's add each other on LINE.
I have class until five today.
cards.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān shàngkè dào wǔ diǎn.

cards.front: Are you free this weekend?
Let's go hiking on Elephant Mountain.
Thank you for your hard work today.
Let's split the bill.
Cheers!
How much is this?
Can you give me a better price?
Do you accept mobile payment?
I'd like to return this, please.
Where is the fitting room?
Do you have this in a smaller size?
cards.back: 這個有小一點的尺寸嗎？
cards.pinyin: zhège yǒu xiǎo yīdiǎn de chǐcùn ma?

cards.front: I'm just looking, thanks.
Where can I exchange foreign currency?
Is there a pharmacy nearby?
I need to buy a new umbrella.
cards.pinyin: wǒ xūyào mǎi yī bǎ xīn yǔsǎn.

cards.front: Excuse me, how do I get to Taipei 101?
cards.back: 請問台北 101 要怎麼走？

cards.front: Can you help me take a photo?
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ bāng wǒ pāi zhāng zhào ma?

cards.front: I'm lost, can you help me?
cards.pinyin: wǒ mílù le, kěyǐ bāng wǒ ma?

cards.front: Is it within walking distance?
How long does it take to get there?
Turn left at the next intersection.
cards.pinyin: zài xià yī ge lùkǒu zuǒzhuǎn.

cards.front: Do I line up here for the gondola?
cards.back: 搭纜車是在這裡排隊嗎？
cards.pinyin: dā lǎnchē shì zài zhèlǐ páiduì ma?

cards.front: What time does the temple open?
Could you speak a little slower, please?
I don't understand, could you say that again?
cards.back: 我聽不懂，可以再說一次嗎？
cards.pinyin: wǒ tīng bù dǒng, kěyǐ zài shuō yī cì ma?

cards.front: Sorry, I only speak a little Chinese.
cards.back: 不好意思，我只會說一點中文。
cards.pinyin: bùhǎoyìsi, wǒ zhǐ huì shuō yīdiǎn Zhōngwén.

cards.front: Thank you so much for your help!
Have you eaten yet?
Mom, what's for dinner tonight?
Don't forget to call grandma this weekend.
cards.back: 別忘了這個週末打電話給奶奶。
cards.pinyin: bié wàng le zhège zhōumò dǎ diànhuà gěi nǎinai.

cards.front: Can you help me set the table?
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ bāng wǒ bǎi wǎnkuài ma?

cards.front: Did you do your homework yet?
I'll be home a little late tonight.
cards.back: 我今天晚上會晚一點回家。
cards.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān wǎnshàng huì wǎn yīdiǎn huíjiā.

cards.front: Remember to take out the trash.
Drive safely on your way back.
How was your day at school?
cards.back: 今天在學校過得怎麼樣？
cards.pinyin: jīntiān zài xuéxiào guò de zěnmeyàng?

cards.front: Let me help you carry that.
Wear more clothes, it's cold outside.
cards.pinyin: duō chuān diǎn yīfu, wàimiàn hěn lěng.

cards.front: Have you taken your medicine?
Let's have dinner together this Sunday.
cards.back: 這個禮拜天我們一起吃晚餐吧。
cards.pinyin: zhège lǐbàitiān wǒmen yīqǐ chī wǎncān ba.

cards.front: Can you pick up the kids today?
cards.back: 你今天可以去接小孩嗎？
cards.pinyin: nǐ jīntiān kěyǐ qù jiē xiǎohái ma?

cards.front: Dad's working late again.
Don't stay up too late.
I miss you, when are you coming home?
cards.back: 我想你，你什麼時候回家？
cards.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng nǐ, nǐ shénme shíhòu huíjiā?

cards.front: Be careful crossing the street.
Help your little brother with his homework.
Did you sleep well last night?
cards.pinyin: nǐ zuówǎn shuì de hǎo ma?

cards.front: I'll wash the dishes tonight.
Let's video call grandpa.
Happy birthday! Make a wish.
cards.pinyin: shēngrì kuàilè! xǔ ge yuàn ba.

cards.front: Are you feeling better today?
cards.pinyin: nǐ jīntiān yǒu hǎo yīdiǎn ma?

cards.front: Turn off the lights when you leave.
cards.pinyin: zǒu de shíhòu jìdé guān dēng.

cards.front: We're so proud of you.
Can you water the plants for me?
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiāo huā ma?

cards.front: Let me know when you get home safe.
cards.pinyin: dào jiā le gēn wǒ shuō yī shēng.

cards.front: It's time to wake up.
Eat more vegetables.
Don't worry, everything will be fine.
cards.pinyin: bié dānxīn, yīqiè dōu huì hǎo de.

cards.front: Let's clean the house together this weekend.
cards.back: 這個週末我們一起打掃吧。
cards.pinyin: zhège zhōumò wǒmen yīqǐ dǎsǎo ba.

cards.front: Can you turn down the TV a bit?
Thanks for cooking, it was delicious.
Long time no see, how have you been?
cards.pinyin: hǎojiǔ bùjiàn, nǐ zuìjìn hǎo ma?

cards.front: Let's grab a meal sometime.
cards.back: 我們找時間一起吃個飯。
cards.pinyin: wǒmen zhǎo shíjiān yīqǐ chī ge fàn.

cards.front: Are you free tonight?
I'll treat you this time.
Let's split it next time.
Do you want to come over?
I'm running a bit late, sorry.
cards.pinyin: wǒ huì wǎn yīdiǎn dào, bàoqiàn.

cards.front: Save me a seat, please.
Let me know if you need anything.
cards.pinyin: yǒu xūyào shénme jiù gēn wǒ shuō.

cards.front: That sounds like a great idea.
I'll text you the details later.
cards.pinyin: wǒ děngděng chuán xìjié gěi nǐ.

cards.front: It's okay, it's no big deal.
cards.back: 沒關係，沒什麼大不了的。

cards.front: Let's take a photo together.
cards.pinyin: wǒmen yīqǐ pāi zhāng zhào ba.

cards.front: I had so much fun today.
cards.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān wán de hǎo kāixīn.

cards.front: Get home safe, text me when you arrive.
cards.back: 路上小心，到家傳訊息給我。
cards.pinyin: lùshàng xiǎoxīn, dào jiā chuán xùnxí gěi wǒ.

cards.front: Happy to help anytime.
What movie do you want to watch?
Let's meet at the MRT exit.
cards.back: 我們在捷運出口碰面吧。
cards.pinyin: wǒmen zài jiéyùn chūkǒu pèngmiàn ba.

cards.front: I owe you one.
cards.pinyin: wǒ qiàn nǐ yī ge rénqíng.

cards.front: Can I borrow your charger?
Cheer up, things will get better.
cards.back: 打起精神，事情會好轉的。
cards.pinyin: dǎqǐ jīngshén, shìqíng huì hǎozhuǎn de.

cards.front: Congratulations, that's amazing news!
cards.back: 恭喜你，這真是太好的消息了！
cards.pinyin: gōngxǐ nǐ, zhè zhēnshì tài hǎo de xiāoxí le!

cards.front: Let's plan a trip together.
cards.back: 我們一起計畫一趟旅行吧。
cards.pinyin: wǒmen yīqǐ jìhuà yī tàng lǚxíng ba.

cards.front: I totally agree with you.
Sorry I missed your call.
cards.back: 抱歉我剛剛沒接到你的電話。
cards.pinyin: bàoqiàn wǒ gānggāng méi jiē dào nǐ de diànhuà.

cards.front: Let's catch up soon.
Thanks for always being there for me.
cards.back: 謝謝你一直陪在我身邊。
cards.pinyin: xièxie nǐ yīzhí péi zài wǒ shēnbiān.

cards.front: Are you free to talk right now?
I'll be there in ten minutes.
Want to order a dish to share?
cards.back: 要不要點一道菜一起分？
cards.pinyin: yào bùyào diǎn yī dào cài yīqǐ fēn?

cards.front: It's been too long, let's hang out.
cards.back: 太久沒見了，我們出來聚聚吧。
cards.pinyin: tài jiǔ méi jiàn le, wǒmen chūlái jùjù ba.

cards.front: Can you recommend a good restaurant?
cards.back: 你可以推薦一間好吃的餐廳嗎？
cards.pinyin: nǐ kěyǐ tuījiàn yī jiān hàochī de cāntīng ma?

cards.front: I'm here if you ever want to talk.
cards.back: 你想聊聊的話，我隨時都在。
cards.pinyin: nǐ xiǎng liáoliáo dehuà, wǒ suíshí dōu zài.

cards.front: Take care of yourself.
Good morning, did you have a good weekend?
cards.pinyin: zǎo'ān, zhōumò guò de hǎo ma?

cards.front: Can we talk for a minute?
I'll send you the report by tonight.
cards.back: 我今天晚上前把報告寄給你。
cards.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān wǎnshàng qián bǎ bàogào jì gěi nǐ.

cards.front: Do you have time for a quick meeting?
cards.pinyin: nǐ yǒu shíjiān kāi ge duǎn huì ma?

cards.front: Thanks for your help with this.
cards.back: 謝謝你幫忙處理這件事。
cards.pinyin: xièxie nǐ bāngmáng chǔlǐ zhè jiàn shì.

cards.front: Could you double-check this for me?
cards.back: 可以幫我再確認一次嗎？
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ bāng wǒ zài quèrèn yī cì ma?

cards.front: Let me know if you have any questions.
cards.pinyin: yǒu rènhé wèntí zài gēn wǒ shuō.

cards.front: I'll be out of the office tomorrow.
Can you cover for me this afternoon?
cards.back: 今天下午可以幫我代班嗎？
cards.pinyin: jīntiān xiàwǔ kěyǐ bāng wǒ dàibān ma?

cards.front: The deadline is this Friday.
cards.back: 截止日期是這個禮拜五。

cards.front: Let's schedule a meeting for next week.
cards.back: 我們下禮拜安排個會議吧。
cards.pinyin: wǒmen xià lǐbài ānpái ge huìyì ba.

cards.front: I'll follow up with the client.
cards.pinyin: wǒ huì gēn kèhù hòuxù liánluò.

cards.front: Nice work on the presentation.
Can you forward me that email?
cards.back: 那封信可以轉寄給我嗎？
cards.pinyin: nà fēng xìn kěyǐ zhuǎnjì gěi wǒ ma?

cards.front: I'm a little behind on this.
Let's grab lunch together.
cards.pinyin: wǒmen yīqǐ qù chī wǔcān ba.

cards.front: Do you need a hand with anything?
cards.pinyin: yǒu shénme xūyào bāngmáng de ma?

cards.front: I'll take care of it right away.
Sorry for the late reply.
Could you explain that again?
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ zài jiěshì yī cì ma?

cards.front: Let's discuss this after lunch.
cards.back: 這件事我們午餐後再討論。
cards.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì wǒmen wǔcān hòu zài tǎolùn.

cards.front: I think we should ask the manager.
cards.back: 我覺得我們應該問一下經理。
cards.pinyin: wǒ juéde wǒmen yīnggāi wèn yīxià jīnglǐ.

cards.front: Can we push the meeting back an hour?
cards.back: 會議可以往後延一個小時嗎？
cards.pinyin: huìyì kěyǐ wǎng hòu yán yī ge xiǎoshí ma?

cards.front: Great, let's move forward with this.
cards.back: 好，那我們就這樣進行吧。
cards.pinyin: hǎo, nà wǒmen jiù zhèyàng jìnxíng ba.

cards.front: I appreciate your patience.
Let's wrap up for today.
cards.pinyin: jīntiān jiù xiān dào zhèlǐ ba.

cards.front: See you tomorrow, have a good evening.
Could you send me the file?
cards.pinyin: kěyǐ bǎ dǎng'àn chuán gěi wǒ ma?

cards.front: I'm not sure, let me check and get back to you.
cards.back: 我不太確定，我查一下再回覆你。
cards.pinyin: wǒ bù tài quèdìng, wǒ chá yīxià zài huífù nǐ.

cards.front: Let's take a short break.
Welcome to the team!
Thank you all for your hard work.
I'd like a bowl of braised pork rice.
Do you have savory soy milk?
One scallion pancake with egg, please.
cards.back: 請給我一份蔥油餅加蛋。
cards.pinyin: qǐng gěi wǒ yī fèn cōngyóubǐng jiā dàn.

cards.front: I'd like a bowl of tofu pudding.
This shaved ice comes with taro balls.
Let's order a plate of three-cup chicken.
cards.pinyin: wǒmen diǎn yī pán sānbēijī ba.

cards.front: I want a cup of winter melon tea.
This is my first time trying pig's blood cake.
cards.back: 這是我第一次吃豬血糕。
cards.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ dì yī cì chī zhūxiěgāo.

cards.front: The pepper buns here are very popular.
cards.back: 這裡的胡椒餅很受歡迎。
cards.pinyin: zhèlǐ de hújiāobǐng hěn shòu huānyíng.

cards.front: I want one rice ball.
My cooking is just so-so.
Excuse me, can I ask you something?
cards.back: 不好意思，可以問你一下嗎？
cards.pinyin: bùhǎoyìsi, kěyǐ wèn nǐ yíxià ma?

cards.front: Anywhere's fine with me.
It's raining, nothing we can do—let's just stay home.
cards.back: 下雨了，沒辦法，我們就待在家吧。
cards.pinyin: xià yǔ le, méi bànfǎ, wǒmen jiù dāi zài jiā ba.

cards.front: That's pretty much it, more or less.
It's not too bad, actually.
Sorry I'm late. It's fine, no worries.
cards.back: 抱歉我遲到了。沒關係，不要緊。
cards.pinyin: bàoqiàn wǒ chídào le. méi guānxi, bú yàojǐn.

cards.front: You've got an exam tomorrow—hang in there!
Come on, help me out just this once.
cards.pinyin: bàituō, jiù bāng wǒ zhè yí cì ma.

cards.front: The bus already left—forget it, let's walk.
cards.back: 公車已經走了，算了，我們用走的吧。
cards.pinyin: gōngchē yǐjīng zǒu le, suàn le, wǒmen yòng zǒu de ba.

cards.front: It depends on the situation.
Hurry up, or we won't make it in time.
cards.back: 快一點，不然就來不及了。
cards.pinyin: kuài yìdiǎn, bùrán jiù láibùjí le.

cards.front: No problem, leave it to me.
Seriously?! You've got to be kidding me.
cards.back: 真的假的？你不是在開玩笑吧？
cards.pinyin: zhēn de jiǎ de? nǐ búshì zài kāiwánxiào ba?

cards.front: Not necessarily—it's hard to say.
Take your time, there's no rush.
Whatever, it's up to you.
It is what it is, just go with the flow.
He suddenly got angry for no reason at all—so baffling.
cards.back: 他突然莫名其妙地生氣了。
cards.pinyin: tā túrán mòmíngqímiào de shēngqì le.

cards.front: It's so hot today, I really can't stand it.
cards.back: 今天好熱，我真的受不了。
cards.pinyin: jīntiān hǎo rè, wǒ zhēn de shòubùliǎo.

cards.front: When I saw the bill, I was completely dumbfounded.
cards.back: 看到帳單的時候，我整個傻眼。
cards.pinyin: kàndào zhàngdān de shíhòu, wǒ zhěnggè shǎyǎn.

cards.front: He was an hour late and didn't even apologize—I'm speechless.
cards.back: 他遲到一小時還不道歉，我真的很無言。
cards.pinyin: tā chídào yì xiǎoshí hái bú dàoqiàn, wǒ zhēn de hěn wúyán.

cards.front: You scared me to death, don't sneak up like that!
cards.back: 你嚇死我了，不要這樣偷偷靠近！
cards.pinyin: nǐ xià sǐ wǒ le, búyào zhèyàng tōutōu kàojìn!

cards.front: The discount was so good that I was really tempted.
cards.back: 折扣太好了，我超心動的。
cards.pinyin: zhékòu tài hǎo le, wǒ chāo xīndòng de.

cards.front: They cancelled the train with no notice—that's outrageous.
cards.back: 他們沒通知就取消火車，超扯的。
cards.pinyin: tāmen méi tōngzhī jiù qǔxiāo huǒchē, chāo chě de.

cards.front: The mosquitoes tonight are so annoying.
cards.pinyin: jīnwǎn de wénzi fán sǐ le.

cards.front: After working all day, I'm completely exhausted.
cards.pinyin: gōngzuò yì zhěng tiān, wǒ lèi sǐ le.

cards.front: Charging that much for a coffee is over the top.
cards.back: 一杯咖啡賣這麼貴，太誇張了。
cards.pinyin: yì bēi kāfēi mài zhème guì, tài kuāzhāng le.

cards.front: I'm reluctant to throw away these old photos.
cards.back: 這些舊照片我捨不得丟。
cards.pinyin: zhèxiē jiù zhàopiàn wǒ shěbùdé diū.

cards.front: I can't believe we won—it feels like a dream.
cards.back: 我不敢相信我們贏了，像做夢一樣。
cards.pinyin: wǒ bùgǎn xiāngxìn wǒmen yíng le, xiàng zuòmèng yíyàng.

cards.front: When I heard everyone was safe, I breathed a sigh of relief.
cards.back: 聽到大家都平安，我鬆了一口氣。
cards.pinyin: tīngdào dàjiā dōu píng'ān, wǒ sōng le yì kǒu qì.

cards.front: Being stuck in traffic for two hours got me really pissed off.
cards.back: 塞車塞了兩個小時，我超火大。
cards.pinyin: sāichē sāi le liǎng ge xiǎoshí, wǒ chāo huǒdà.

cards.front: The show sold out—what a shame.
cards.back: 表演的票賣完了，好可惜。
cards.pinyin: biǎoyǎn de piào màiwán le, hǎo kěxí.

cards.front: I'm so touched, thank you all so much.
cards.back: 我好感動，真的很謝謝大家。
cards.pinyin: wǒ hǎo gǎndòng, zhēn de hěn xièxie dàjiā.

cards.front: That horror movie was terrifying, my heart is still pounding.
cards.back: 那部恐怖片好可怕，我心臟還在跳。
cards.pinyin: nà bù kǒngbùpiàn hǎo kěpà, wǒ xīnzàng hái zài tiào.

cards.front: Hearing that good news made my whole day.
cards.back: 聽到這個好消息，我一整天心情都很好。
cards.pinyin: tīngdào zhège hǎo xiāoxi, wǒ yì zhěng tiān xīnqíng dōu hěn hǎo.
